# Router-name: hupu_news  
**Commit time:** 2026.07.20  
**Cookies?:** no  
**Author:** AI转写 / huinyg审核 - 来源于RSShub@hyoban  
**Introduction:** 虎扑球队新闻  
**Address:** rssust://hupu_news  
**Example:** [rssust://hupu_news?team=spurs](/hupu_news?team=spurs)  
**Parameter:**  
1. **team**  
   Type of parameter: string  
   Default value: null  
   Meaning: 球队英文名（小写），如 spurs, lakers, warriors, celtics 等
